findings.description: No firewall (ufw/iptables) is installed or active. VPS has public ports 22, 80, 443, 3002, 8080 exposed with no firewall guard.
findings.recommendation: Install and configure ufw: sudo apt install ufw && sudo ufw default deny incoming && sudo ufw allow 22/tcp && sudo ufw allow 80/tcp && sudo ufw allow 443/tcp && sudo ufw enable

findings.description: Workspace config files had permissive permissions (664). FIXED: openclaw.json and notion-memory-db.json are now 600.
PasswordAuthentication=no, PermitRootLogin=no — SSH config is hardened.
~/.ssh dir is 700, private keys are 600 — correct.
No failed SSH attempts detected in recent logs.
